182K186K164K200K174K196K1.1M1307.25M69.75%2.23%
+15%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 15% more healing for 5 seconds.
+5
Pillar of Confidence
Harbinger's Barrier takes 5 sec longer to reach full efficiency.
-15%
The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 15% weaker.
+30%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 30% for 5 seconds.
2
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 2 sec faster.

When stepping into the material world, heroes heal 25% of their max HP.

+5%
Sparkling Mood
Increases Pet Patronage power by 5%.

Mischievous Team

Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 20 seconds.

Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 10% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.

When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 30% for 5 seconds.

Pillar of Confidence
Harbinger's Barrier takes 5 sec longer to reach full efficiency.
+15%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 15% more healing for 5 seconds.

Through a Prism

118K186K91.1K174K92.2K95.5K757K13011.8M36.01%3.62%
2
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 2 sec faster.
+30%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
3
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 3 sec.
20
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 20 seconds.
+10%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 10% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
+15%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 15% more healing for 5 seconds.
+50%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 50% of basic attack damage back as healing.

141K27.3K19.4K28.1K27.5K28.7K272K130188K2.33%0.06%
+30%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+50%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 50% of basic attack damage back as healing.
+10%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 10% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
+3
Charmer's Skill
Requiem takes 3 sec longer to reach full efficiency.
2
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 2 sec faster.
-5%
Effective Tactics
The initial damage reduction of Harbinger's Barrier is reduced by 5%.
-5%
Strength in Perseverance
Interrupting the Deafening Motif of the Thundering Horn requires 5% less healing.

The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 15% more healing for 5 seconds.
+5
Pillar of Confidence
Harbinger's Barrier takes 5 sec longer to reach full efficiency.
-15%
The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 15% weaker.
+30%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 30% for 5 seconds.
+50%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 50% of basic attack damage back as healing.
